title: Vanilla Farmers Plus+
description: A simple modpack that adds more aesthetic in the vanilla game
body:
🌾 Vanilla Farmers Plus+
A simple farming modpack with a touch of charm.

Vanilla Farmers Plus+ is a lightweight modpack designed for players who love the cozy, rustic side of Minecraft. It enhances the farming experience with aesthetic improvements, extra crops, and subtle additions—without straying too far from the vanilla feel.

Perfect for casual play, roleplay servers, or anyone wanting to build a beautiful countryside farm without the bloat of big tech or magic mods.

Features:

✿ Extra crops, plants, and food variety

🛖 Decorative blocks and furniture to style your farm

🧑‍🌾 Farming tools and tweaks for a smoother experience

🍂 Maintains a vanilla-friendly balance

Whether you're tending crops, building a barn, or just enjoying the scenery—this pack adds that little extra charm.
